title: La Baguette
description: Retextures bread into a French baguette!
body:
Retextures bread into a French baguette!

![Le Tricolore (French Flag)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a8eef170ce5162db8a96f698fa96fa505a4710c.png)
![Bread in "La Baguette"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/118aa2de95fb819426f0bc1d06d7ea2699b6da1a.png)

What this pack does:
- Adds baguette textures and models, replacing bread
- Renames "Bread" to "Baguette"
- Less obtrusive off-hand slot
- Eating animations!

Thanks to tixork for helping with GUI rendering!
